name: kasowa-highlight
description: Highlight words, text, and regex matches in VS Code with a docked panel, quick navigation, and save/load slots.

kasowaHighlight.colorMode.description: Select whether highlight colors follow the current theme or always use the light or dark color set.

kasowaHighlight.showPanelJumpButtons.description: Show previous/next jump arrow buttons on highlight chips in the panel.

kasowaHighlight.light.pattern1.backgroun.description: Background color for light theme highlight pattern 1.

kasowaHighlight.light.pattern1.foregroun.description: Foreground color for light theme highlight pattern 1.
